local_pr_validation: cd backend && php artisan enneagram:result-page-agent audit --run-id=smoke --artifact-dir=<tmpdir> --json
cd backend && php artisan enneagram:result-page-agent audit --run-id=smoke-strict --artifact-dir=<tmpdir> --strict --json
future_candidate_export_gate: cd backend && PHASE8B_CANDIDATE_DIR=<candidate-dir> PHASE8B1_OUTPUT_DIR=<tmp-output> php artisan enneagram:export-production-equivalent-candidate-payloads --json
assert phase8b1_summary.json verdict starts with PASS_
future_inactive_import_gate: cd backend && PHASE8B_CANDIDATE_DIR=<candidate-dir> PHASE8D2B_OUTPUT_DIR=<tmp-output> php artisan enneagram:import-inactive-candidate-release --json
